name: Cajun Creole Blend
description: Our signature blend of paprika, garlic, onion, and cayenne. Perfect for gumbo, jambalaya, and blackened dishes.

name: Bayou Blackening Spice
description: Robust mix for blackened fish and chicken. Paprika, thyme, oregano, and a kick of cayenne.

name: Holy Trinity Seasoning
description: Celery, bell pepper, and onion in spice form. The soul of Creole cooking.

name: Smoked Paprika
description: Spanish-style smoked paprika. Sweet and smoky, ideal for rubs and finishing.

name: Cayenne Pepper
description: Ground cayenne for heat and color. From mild to extra hot options.

name: File Powder
description: Ground sassafras for authentic gumbo. Use as a thickener and flavor enhancer.

name: Mardi Gras Mix
description: Festive blend of herbs and spices for party dishes and king cake season.

name: Voodoo Heat
description: Our hottest blend. Ghost pepper, habanero, and cayenne for the brave.

name: Creole Mustard Seed
description: Whole brown mustard seeds for pickles, dressings, and Creole mustard.
